prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次依次约 20594→20380→23353→26440→22695 名，整体呈波动后移趋势；2023–2024 年连续两年后移约 6000 名，2025 年大幅回升约 3745 名，显示报考热度有所恢复，2025 年基准位次约 22695 名；该校在河北省物理类招生计划 2021–2025 年依次为 172→176→178→182→191 人，逐年小幅扩招；2026 年计划 203 人，较 2025 年再扩招 12 人（+6.28%），扩招幅度高于往年，对竞争有一定缓解作用，但位次仍将后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河海大学为 211、双一流高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 63 名（2025 年第 64 名），近年排名稳中有升，学校综合实力和认可度保持稳定；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音学校热度排名第 52 位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，反映报考关注度尚可但非高热；水利工程 A+（全国顶尖）、土木工程 A、环境科学与工程 A，均为国家级一流学科；水利类、土木类、环境类专业与学校王牌学科高度关联，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程 等专业持续高热推荐，河海大学在上述领域设有大禹强化班等优质项目，吸引高分考生；河北省 2026 年高考总人数约 60.98 万，较 2025 年略增，物理类考生数估算约 36.5 万，基本持平，2025 年物理类本科批 459 分，近年呈上升趋势，反映整体竞争水平略有提升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026 年小幅扩招、考生总数略增、学校声誉平稳及王牌学科吸引力，预计 2026 年物理类最低位次在 2025 年基准 22695 名基础上后移；预测最低位次约 23601 名，区间 23101–24100 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 20594 → 20380 → 23353 → 26440 → 22695, showing a fluctuating and then declining trend; in 2023–2024, rankings declined for two consecutive years by about 6000 places, but in 2025 they rebounded significantly by about 3745 places, indicating a recovery in application popularity, with a baseline ranking of about 22695 for 2025; the enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province from 2021 to 2025 was 172 → 176 → 178 → 182 → 191 students, with a gradual small expansion each year; the 2026 plan is 203 students, an increase of 12 students (+6.28%) over 2025, a larger expansion than previous years, which somewhat alleviates competition but rankings will still decline.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a 211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking in 2026 is approximately 63rd (64th in 2025), with a stable and slightly rising ranking in recent years, maintaining stable comprehensive strength and recognition; its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps; its Douyin school popularity ranking is 52nd (relatively popular), with medium-to-high short video exposure, reflecting moderate but not extremely high application attention; Water Resources Engineering is A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering is A, and Environmental Science and Engineering is A, all national first-class disciplines; majors in Water Resources, Civil Engineering, and Environment are highly correlated with the university's flagship disciplines, strongly attracting students in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular and recommended; Hohai University offers high-quality programs like the Dayu Intensive Class in these fields, attracting high-scoring students; the total number of Hebei Province Gaokao examinees in 2026 is about 609,800, a slight increase from 2025, with an estimated Physics Category examinee count of about 365,000, roughly unchanged; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch cutoff was 459 points, showing an upward trend in recent years, reflecting a slight increase in overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on historical ranking fluctuations, the small expansion in 2026, a slight increase in total examinees, stable university reputation, and the appeal of flagship disciplines, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will decline from the 2025 baseline of 22695; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 23601, with a range of 23101–24100.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 23101–24100, it is recommended to primarily fill Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Water Resources Dayu Class, Electrical Engineering, etc.) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Materials, Civil Engineering, Environment, etc.) as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., within 23000), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is near the lower limit of the range (e.g., around 24000), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年历史类最低位次依次约 2521→3025→3205→3483→3660 名，连续 5 年逐年后移，累计后移约 1139 名，呈持续降温趋势；2025 年基准位次约 3660 名；该校在河北省历史类招生计划 2021–2025 年依次为 27→23→23→26→23 人，整体呈缩减趋势；2026 年计划仅 18 人，较 2025 年大幅缩减 5 人（-21.74%），缩招幅度显著，将加剧竞争，推动位次前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河海大学为 211、双一流高校；软科排名约第 63 名，学校层次稳定，对文科考生仍具较强吸引力；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情；抖音热度较热（总排名第 52），短视频平台有一定曝光；河海大学以工科见长，文科类优势学科相对较少；思想政治教育对应马克思主义理论学科（河海大学未评级），法学、会计学等 专业无对应 A 类学科评估，但法学社会热度偏热，会计/财务分化观望。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业热度偏热，会计/财务/审计分化观望，汉语言/中文推荐；河北省历史类考生数估算约 24.5 万，较 2025 年略增，近年持续上升，竞争环境趋紧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年大幅缩招 21.74%、考生总数略增及声誉平稳，预计 2026 年历史类最低位次在 2025 年基准 3660 名基础上前移；预测最低位次约 3153 名，区间 2653–3653 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2521→3025→3205→3483→3660, shifting backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative shift of about 1139 places, showing a continuous cooling trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 3660; the enrollment plan for History Category in Hebei Province from 2021 to 2025 was 27→23→23→26→23, showing an overall reduction trend; the 2026 plan is only 18, a significant reduction of 5 (-21.74%) compared to 2025, which will intensify competition and push rankings forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a 211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science ranking is about 63rd, with a stable school level, still strongly attractive to liberal arts candidates; its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion; it is relatively popular on Douyin (overall ranking 52nd), with some exposure on short video platforms; Hohai University is strong in engineering, with relatively few advantageous disciplines in liberal arts; Ideological and Political Education corresponds to the Marxist Theory discipline (Hohai University is not rated), and majors like Law and Accounting have no corresponding A-class discipline evaluations, but Law is relatively popular, while Accounting/Finance is in a wait-and-see state.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major is relatively popular, Accounting/Finance/Auditing is in a wait-and-see state, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended; the estimated number of History Category candidates in Hebei Province is about 245,000, slightly higher than in 2025, with a continuous upward trend in recent years, tightening the competitive environment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift of historical rankings, the significant 21.74% reduction in enrollment in 2026, a slight increase in the total number of candidates, and stable reputation, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will move forward from the 2025 baseline of 3660; the predicted minimum ranking is about 3153, with a range of 2653–3653.
